# Over-budget fixture (AC-D01)

Deliberately exceeds the 850-proxy-token ceiling so
`scripts/token-budget-check.sh` is proven to fail (exit 1) on a
too-large always-loaded region. Filler content below is repeated
padding, not real cortex prose.
